title: After the Tenno Sho (Autumn): Overlapping Dreams

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin crosses the finish line in the autumn
Tenno Sho alongside the dreams of many, with a
smile of pure joy on her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her doubts are gone. She's going to keep
enjoying running for herself. And I bet she'll turn
all those cheers into her driving force.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that in mind, I decide to make our next race
the one she'll enjoy most.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're taking on the Japan Cup, a race in which
runners from around the globe compete. And
knowing Ines, I'm confident she'll be able to enjoy
herself more than anyone in the world!
